dataTypeNote: QC catalog claims dataType 'sample-layer'; config.js (verified) registers { name:'Sample Layer', dataType:'layer-2' }. 'layer-2' is the authoritative catalog dataType used for the drop.
module: layer-container (dropped into Generic Step column; GenericStep["layer-2"]=true)
qcSource: Author Test Cases - Sample Layer _TIG Panel.pdf
architectureNotes: VERIFIED dataType is 'layer-2' (config.js name 'Sample Layer'); the QC catalog's 'sample-layer' is not the catalog dataType.

Sample Layer is a LAYER CONTAINER, not an assessment widget. It is dropped into a Generic Step column (config GenericStep['layer-2']=true), like a layout. It is intentionally NOT added to support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES (no files outside the component folder were modified); the drop is performed explicitly via cy.dropWidgetIntoGenericStep('Sample Layer', col, 'layer-2').

Canvas DOM: .sample-layer-parent-container > .sample-main-layer banner with .tagBlockName spans rendered from tagDataCollection (tag 'Sample Answers', tagColor #C91CA5, default 'On') → banner text 'Sample Answers: On'. The directive stamps data-sampletaginfo='{"Sample_Answers":"On"}'.
The .sample-layer-container has a 1px solid #C91CA5 (pink) border in authoring (sample-layer-template.css) — DOM-assertable.
Settings panel id is #sample-layer-template-setting (title 'Sample Layer'); tag radios are values 'Off'/'On' bound to currSettings.TagClolorData[i].defaultvalue, with 'Off' ng-disabled.

Pink colouring of the actual sample ANSWERS (FIB/ER/MCQ/table/math text), the TIG (teacher instructional guide) panel, scroll bars, and outline-hiding are applied by sample-layer-preview1.js at Reader/CLP runtime — those, plus Studio activity-creation, Publish, Saltire teacher review, copy/paste lifecycle, persistence-after-reload and a11y are deferred.
Not yet live-verified against a running authoring instance — selectors are source-derived.
